title: ellipeia costata
intro: Ellipeia costata is a plant species that belongs to the family Ebenaceae and is native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Ellipeia costata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use in traditional medicine to aid digestion and relieve headaches. Ellipeia costata can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
